## Summary

What changed and why?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run release:dry-run` if release/package files changed

## Privacy Checklist

- [ ] New sensors emit semantic state, not raw private content.
- [ ] Camera/screen/media behavior stays explicit and opt-in.
- [ ] Permission failures degrade gracefully.
- [ ] Docs and evals were updated for behavior changes.
